content.en:
"Kunwu Supreme, once I hit the galaxy level, I won't be able to stay in the Terran Supreme Hall Heaven level area, what should I do next, I don't know what Kunwu Supreme suggests?"

Ye Tian asked sincerely.

"There are two choices!" Kunwu Supreme said: "The first choice is to continue to stay in the Terran Supreme Palace, but you definitely can't stay in the heaven-level area, but choose to hold a position in the Terran Supreme Palace, if it is an ordinary highness, I would suggest this, but I suggest that you do not stay in the Terran Supreme Hall to hold a certain position." "

"Why?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Kunwu Supreme is in charge of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, and it stands to reason that he will try his best to keep him in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, why not let him stay in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race.

"Because you're so genius!" "Once you hold a certain position in the Terran Supreme Palace, you will have to sacrifice some time to deal with the affairs of the Terran Supreme Palace, and many trivial matters will affect your cultivation. Your path to growth shouldn't be bothered by these trifles, so I don't recommend that you stay in the Terran Supreme Temple. "

"And what about the second option?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Under the command of the Divine Blade Alliance, walking in the name of casual cultivation, you can develop your own power by the way. Haven't you established a Heavenly Pavilion, you can develop a Heavenly Pavilion, once the Heavenly Pavilion develops, the future may be able to bring you some unexpected opportunities. You may be curious, why did I suggest that you name the Divine Blade Alliance? Because the other supreme-level forces are all sectarian forces, and you have no background, maybe after joining, you will be cultivated by the supremes, but others will definitely resist you, because you have interests with other people. People are selfish, and the Supremes are not selfish, but others can't. In a force that excludes you and resists you, it is very difficult for you to get more opportunities. So, I don't recommend that you join other supreme forces. The Divine Blade Alliance is different, this is a force similar to the Scattered Cultivation Alliance, among the forces, the main way is to receive tasks, pay attention to equivalent transactions, and there are not too many constraints. Besides, with your potential and status, if something really happens, we, the Supremes, will not let it go. Therefore, the Named Divine Blade Alliance is the best choice! But the decision is up to you, once the Named Divine Blade Alliance, the inevitable road will definitely be a little dangerous, and staying in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race will be much safer, and there will be fewer opportunities!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

Ye Tian very much agreed with Kunwu Supreme's statement, if he continued to stay in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, it would be impossible for the Supreme Hall of the Human Race to give him too many opportunities.

The Terran Supreme Hall is an institution dedicated to cultivating His Highness, not an institution above the galaxy level, such as the Dark Master, the Terran Supreme Hall is unlikely to give too many opportunities, but they don't have much free time.

Therefore, the powerhouses of the supreme hall of the human race seem to be very safe, but in fact, the speed of progress is far inferior to those sect forces.

After Ye Tian understood the truth, he naturally would not choose to stay in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

"Kunwu Supreme, I choose the second path!"

Ye Tian said.

"Well, since you have decided, then after impacting the galaxy level, go to the Divine Blade Alliance to register, I will say hello to the Divine Blade Supreme, but you don't expect him to take special care of you, all opportunities still need you to work hard yourself, the Divine Blade Supreme will try to rush over when you are in danger at most!" Kunwu Supreme said.

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded in response.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Kunwu Palace.

After resting for a few days, Ye Tian left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

This time, Ye Tian still chose to impact the galaxy level in the Origin Realm.

The process of his impact is different from others, he has already opened up the dantian world, and now he only needs to let the dantian world truly transform, and by the way, he will have a thunder tribulation, so that he can truly become a galaxy-level powerhouse.

Somewhere in the Origin Realm.

The Dark Lord was guarding in the dark, while Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to attack the galaxy level.

"The galaxy level is the dantian turned into the world, although I have created the Chaos Ancient Realm, but the power of the Chaos Ancient Realm cannot be truly mobilized, the real galaxy-level source of power is the world, the body and the world are one, I now want to achieve the unity of the body and the world, perfect control of the world, the galaxy level can also be called the master of the world!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Next, Ye Tian began to try to merge with the Chaos Ancient Realm and move his immortal soul to the Chaos Ancient Realm.

Rumble!!!!

The immortal soul successfully moved to the Chaos Ancient Realm, sat cross-legged in the void of the Chaos Ancient Realm, and immediately poured all the immortal power into the Chaos Ancient Realm, trying to break the world barriers of the Chaos Ancient Realm.

"Broken !!"

Boom.

The world barrier was broken, and immediately, under Ye Tian's control, the Chaos Ancient Realm began to expand, and slowly merged perfectly with the physical body.

This step was very slow, and it would take a long time for the Chaos Ancient Realm to truly transform.

In the blink of an eye, a few days passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Chaotic Ancient Realm really began to transform, frantically absorbing the surrounding vitality.

To transform the Chaos Ancient Realm, it is far from enough to have one's own immortal power, and even the surrounding vitality is not enough.

Wow!

Ye Tian took out a large number of World Source Stones and Divine Crystals and other resources.

His breakthrough is unmatched by others, so he must be well prepared.

Bang!!!!

The Chaos Ancient Realm expanded and strengthened at an incredible speed, and the aura on Ye Tian's body became stronger and stronger.

The three abilities of Essence, Qi and God also began to slowly merge, forming wisps of world origin, allowing the Chaos Ancient Realm to begin to give birth to true vitality.

Although the previous Chaos Ancient Realm was also a world, it was a lifeless world, but now the Chaos Ancient Realm has been born with vitality, with the Origin Law and other rules, and it is a real world.

But what kind of quality of world can really become depends on Ye Tian's heritage.

And this essence is the three energies of essence, qi and spirit!

Therefore, the stronger the physical body, the more the compression multiple of the immortal power, the stronger the soul, and the more understanding of the laws between heaven and earth, the better the world formed.

Time passed little by little, and the resources around Ye Tian were gradually consumed, and even the World Source Stone was also consumed in large quantities.

1,000 World Source Stones!

2,000 World Source Stones!

3,000 World Source Stones!

......

The Dark Lord was stunned when he saw that Ye Tian had consumed so many World Source Stones, and there was no sign of stopping.

"The potential of His Highness Ten Thousand Laws is really amazing, a few hundred pieces for others are enough, even if it is a Constant-level Highness with high potential, 2,000 World Source Stones is basically enough, but looking at the breakthrough of His Highness Ten Thousand Laws, I am afraid that it will take thousands of World Source Stones!"

The Dark Lord thought to himself.

Another day passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already consumed nearly 10,000 World Source Stones, and the other resources consumed were also innumerable, and even the surrounding vitality was also consumed, making the surroundings a vacuum.

In order to let Ye Tian have enough vitality, the Dark Lord even mobilized his own power to control the vitality of other regions, and poured into Ye Tian's side, so that Ye Tian would not lack vitality.

With the assistance of a large number of resources and the World Source Stone, Ye Tian's Chaos Ancient Realm had expanded hundreds of times, and the world had also stabilized hundreds of times.

Suddenly.

A small sapling was born in the Chaos Ancient Realm, and slowly turned into a towering giant tree.

Then, it continued to grow, bigger and bigger.

"World Tree!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

"No, it's the Chaos Ancient Tree!"

Ye Tian saw the chaotic aura that permeated this tree, and suddenly woke up.

At the beginning, although Ye Tian had obtained the Chaos Ancient Tree, when he opened up the Chaos Ancient Realm, he had already consumed the Chaos Ancient Tree.

Unexpectedly, he hit the galaxy level, and the Chaos Ancient Realm transformed, allowing the Chaos Ancient Tree to reappear, and it was more majestic and majestic than the previous Chaos Ancient Tree.

At the moment of breakthrough in cultivation, Ye Tian's immortal soul was also much stronger.

Taking advantage of this opportunity, Ye Tian ran the Hades Secret Codex, and actually broke the bottleneck of the soul in one fell swoop, allowing the immortal soul to step into the level of the Hades.

It's a double win!

The Chaos Ancient Realm transforms, and the immortal power is quickly transformed into galaxy-level immortal power, and the immortal power can be transformed into the world power of the Chaos Ancient Realm at any time, and the world power can also be transformed into immortal power.

At this moment, Ye Tian was truly promoted to the first order of the galaxy level.

Just as Ye Tian stood up, a huge and incomparably large thunder cloud appeared in the void.

"The Thunder Tribulation is coming, this time it should be 12 Thunder Tribulations!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself in a low voice.

Soon, the first thunderstorm struck.

This Thunder Tribulation far surpassed the previous Thunder Tribulation, which was enough to wipe out the powerful galaxy-level peak powerhouse, but Ye Tian just glanced at this first Thunder Tribulation indifferently, grabbed the Thunder Tribulation with one hand, and pinched it gently, and directly pinched the first Thunder Tribulation into nothingness.

The second thunderstorm!

The third thunder tribulation!

......

One after another thunder tribulations came, Ye Tian directly shook the thunder tribulation with his physical body, and easily exploded the power of the thunder tribulation.

In a short time, all twelve thunder tribulations came.

Ye Tian survived the Thunder Tribulation intact, which was very easy, but if he was replaced by other Supreme Highnesses to survive such a Thunder Tribulation, there was a ninety percent chance that he would fall and die.

Surreptitiously.

Seeing that the Dark Lord had survived this level of Thunder Tribulation so easily, without any damage, he didn't need to sigh: "I'm afraid His Highness Wanfa's current strength is enough to kill an ordinary Cosmic God, and even a powerful Cosmic God can't kill His Highness Wanfa!"

remembered that when he was promoted to the galaxy level, he was much worse than Ye Tian, and he was not even as good as one of Ye Tian's fingers.

Swish!

The Dark Lord revealed his body and appeared in front of Ye Tian, congratulating, "Congratulations to His Highness Wanfa for advancing to the galaxy-level realm!"

"The Lord of Darkness is polite, from today onwards, I am no longer Your Highness!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Then I will call you the True Monarch of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Dark Lord smiled.

From this moment on, the Dark Lord will no longer be Ye Tian's guard, but even so, the Dark Lord is still very polite to Ye Tian.

After all, with Ye Tian's growth speed, the Dark Lord believed that Ye Tian would surpass him in not too many years.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned to the Supreme Hall of the Terran to stabilize the realm, he was not in a hurry to leave the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, he was going to stay for a while, he believed that the Supreme Hall of the Terran would not be in a hurry to drive him away.

"Let's test the quality of the world first!"

Ye Tian thought.

He took out a world bead and poured his world power into it, and immediately two words appeared in the world bead.
